nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable source requiring correction
nodes.grounding_span: I use it about once a month to help me generate ideas for 'themes of the day'

nodes.label: AI understanding of user intent
nodes.label_negative: AI's failure to infer user intent without overspecification
nodes.grounding_span: one always hopes that the model can 'read my mind' for the intent of my prompt without my having to overspecify it

nodes.label: AI for student engagement and motivation

nodes.grounding_span: If my responsibilities evolve to take on further administrative functions, I can see myself using AI to help organize some lists

nodes.label: Concern about AI-drafted communications being detected
nodes.grounding_span: recipients can sense when an e-mail has been mostly drafted by an AI model, and they might feel negatively about that
